decisions.rationale: Dashboard.tsx brownfield slot builders still call useUserProfile at page level, while useDashboardUser + DashboardUserProvider wrap the rendered subtree inside DashboardMain. AC-3 passes: composable maps current_user display fields and provider exposes them to widget slots. Slot children rendered inside DashboardUserProvider can consume useDashboardUserContext regardless of where JSX is authored; DASH-02+ widget extractions (DashboardGreetingCard, quick actions) will adopt the composable as they replace inline page markup. No downstream depends_on gate is blocked — provider is mounted and functional before DASH-02 implement.

IR re-read confirms bTIpm (continue-onboarding / subscription banner group) is a direct child of ai_RNbBHXRD, sibling to ai_RNbBHXRE; brownfield beforeGrid CTAs currently nest inside dashboard-content. bTIpm is not a DASH-01 named ui_ref (scope lists ai_RNbBHXRD through ai_RNbBHXRX only). DASH-07 decompose AC-2 and layout_notes explicitly assign bTIpm as a sibling banner region above the grid; DASH-03 covers micro-commitment subscription rows in the same banner group. Scaffold retention inside ai_RNbBHXRE is acceptable brownfield for DASH-01; hierarchy correction belongs to DASH-03+/DASH-07 without blocking slot anchors or grid structure.

Decompose scope states 'no widget internals'; DASH-01 AC-2 requires fluid grid with named slot bubble ids, not populated journal/crisis content. ui_evidence passes for ai_RNbBHXSx and bTIfU with empty placeholder slots; review alternative confirms no DASH-01 action. Journal and crisis widget content is explicitly assigned to DASH-06-chat-and-journal-previews and DASH-07-crisis-onboarding-services-overlays, both depending on this scaffold.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 page-level useUserProfile → useDashboardUserContext migration at DASH-02+ widget extraction; C-2 bTIpm sibling banner hierarchy at DASH-03+/DASH-07. Accepted: C-3 empty journal/crisis slots per scaffold scope; DASH-06/DASH-07 mount content into existing bubble anchors.
